meanings.definition: bending the head or body or knee as a sign of reverence or submission or shame or greeting
managing the bow in playing a stringed instrument
bend one's knee or body, or lower one's head
examples: She bowed her head in shame

meanings.definition: yield to another's wish or opinion
examples: The government bowed to the military pressure

meanings.definition: bend the head or the upper part of the body in a gesture of respect or greeting
bend one's back forward from the waist on down
examples: The young man stooped to pick up the girl's purse

meanings.definition: play on a string instrument with a bow
